description_long: This is a pair of vintage, steampunk-inspired binocular glasses with a robust metallic frame and intricate mechanical detailing. The frame is thick and full-rimmed, featuring prominent, rounded lens housings and protective side shields that extend backward. The bridge is solid and cylindrical, connecting the two lenses with a central, gear-like embellishment. The temples are short, thick, and appear to be reinforced, with visible screws and engraved patterns, including a ship motif and text indicating a London origin and serial number. The lenses are dark and opaque, suggesting a protective or specialized function, and the overall design is both functional and decorative, evoking a sense of historical craftsmanship.
description: A pair of vintage, steampunk-style binocular glasses with a thick metallic frame, engraved details, and dark, rounded lenses.
description_view_0: Side view showing the engraved ship motif and text on the outer frame, as well as the robust, shielded lens housings.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the large, round dark lenses, central bridge, and symmetrical mechanical design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the engravings and mechanical structure seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying both engraved panels, the central bridge, and the alignment of the lens housings and temples.
attribute_frame_design: The frame is thick, full-rimmed, and rounded, with prominent lens housings and extended side shields. It features mechanical embellishments and engraved panels, giving it a robust, industrial appearance.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are dark and opaque, appearing almost black with no visible gradient or transparency, suggesting a strong tint or protective coating.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a solid, cylindrical structure with a central, gear-like embellishment, connecting the two lenses in a sturdy and decorative manner.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are short, thick, and reinforced, featuring visible screws and engraved patterns, including a ship motif and serial number, adding to the vintage and decorative style.
attribute_brand_logo: An engraved insignia with text and a ship motif is visible on the outer panels, indicating a London origin and serial number, but no modern brand logo is present.
